items.name: verify-completion
items.title: Verify Completion
items.description: Gate every "it works / it's fixed / tests pass / done" claim behind fresh evidence — run the actual verifying command, read its output, and only then state the result. Use before committing, opening a PR, marking a task complete, handing off to or trusting a subagent, or otherwise asserting that work succeeded.
items.author: Khaled Saeed
